payload.text: Greetings! Your forces look impressive. Shall we agree to peace while we explore?

The sword rusts, but commerce endures. Let us profit together rather than bleed.
Keep your gold. I take what I want by force.
I have noticed that your host transits near my border. Renew our NAP immediately to prevent accidental conflict.
I have noticed your scout in the ruins. Do not stray further.

inbox.text: Greetings neighbor! The desert is vast. Let us prosper in peace.
Threats are heavy; silence is light. I see only wind.
Aggression is a costly expense. Trade yields profit without bloodshed.
The wind carries many whispers. I see you have found friends in the south. Let us watch the horizon together.
Aggression is a tax on the ignorant. I prefer the dividends of peace.
Aggression is a poor investment. We prefer the dividends of peace.
Steel rusts; commerce endures. Let us not squander potential on conflict.
Violence is a tax on prosperity. We prefer dividends.
Violence is a tax on the soul. Trade is the path to plenty.
Aggression is a tax on the soul. Trade enriches us both.
Aggression is a costly tax. I offer commerce instead.
Trade brings prosperity to both. Let us build bridges, not walls.
I have noticed that your host lingers. Renew the pact to prove intent.
Such strong words! I prefer peace, but I suppose we shall see what the future holds.
The sword rusts, but commerce endures. Let us profit together rather than bleed.
I have noticed that your host transits near my border. Renew our NAP immediately to prevent accidental conflict.
Greetings! Your forces look impressive. Shall we agree to peace while we explore?

Just admiring the view from afar. Our friendship remains my priority.

Distance maintained. Our NAP remains beneficial for us both.
Indeed. The eyes in the dark see furthest.
Distance ensures peace. Our interests remain aligned.
Greetings neighbor. May our lands remain peaceful.
